title: [v3.4] System tests: fix RHEL8 gating tests
body:
Add a fix for RHEL8 gating tests. This resolves yet another
journald/file events/logger mismatch bug.

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *edsantiago* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/v3.4/OWNERS)~~ [edsantiago] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

I'm about 80% sure that I have the right branch for RHEL8.6. Would appreciate confirmation or correction.

@jnovy this should fix the gating-test failure we discussed today

[Flake](https://storage.googleapis.com/cirrus-ci-6707778565701632-fcae48/artifacts/containers/podman/5126913235615744/html/int-podman-fedora-33-root-container.log.html#t--podman-make-sure-once-container-is-removed--1) was #11682, which is f33-only, so we're sweeping it under the rug, la la la la
